'''Maree Yad''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] wanted by [[Pixelito Grand Council]] for dealing [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] to the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] youth of [[Pixelito/Legends|Pixelito]].

His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was eventually claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
Maree Yad's bounty is worth 2,400 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,200 [[Death/Legends|dead]].

According to the ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'', [[Setongah]] is supposed to be the third bounty to encounter but in his place instead is Maree Yad. It is unclear which is which.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
